title: Navigating Suggested Learning Resources for Exploratory Data Analysis
description: A flowchart illustrating the recommended sequence and relationships between different types of learning resources for mastering EDA in Module 5.
relationships: Foundational Readings provide the theory which is then applied in Interactive Tutorials
Software Documentation is referenced while working on Practical Projects
Video Lectures offer visual explanations that complement Textbooks
Community Forums are used for problem-solving during all practical stages
